FR-01.title: Build Seller Registration and Verification API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for seller registration and verification feature in Online Auction Platform. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.description: Create user interface components for seller registration and verification. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.description: Write unit and integration tests for seller registration and verification feature. Cover happy path, error cases, edge cases, and validation rules. Achieve minimum 80% coverage.
